description: 5 of 7 integr8 modules — the ones whose internal deps are all already moved (types) OR in this same batch (tomlSerializer for migrationExecutor). dataIngestion + integr8/index.js are deferred because dataIngestion still has 6 requires to sibling parser files in lib/commands/ that haven't moved yet — they'll migrate together in the indexing batch.
followUps: After tomlSerializer is moved, retarget src/features/schema-cards/manifest-generator.js to require('../integr8/toml-serializer') directly instead of using the LIB_DIR walk-up (that hand-patch was provisional from batch 004).
